title: The Dawn of the Agent Age

mentions.quoted_text: The NVIDIA open AI deal has zero impact on our financial relationship with open AI.
mentions.context_snippet: Oracle responded first in a statement provided to the WSJ and later published on X. The NVIDIA open AI deal has zero impact on our financial relationship with open AI.

facts.fact_value: Oracle remains confident in OpenAI's ability to raise funds and meet commitments

mentions.quoted_text: The latest update for Apple's coding platform Xcode adds support for both Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs directly in the developer environment.

facts.fact_value: agentic coding support with Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs

mentions.quoted_text: The feature is being built using MCP, meaning access isn't just limited to Clawed and Codecs.

mentions.review_reason: Unclear if MCP is a software product or protocol

new_type_candidates.reason: Mention of 'Meta Ray Bans' as a hardware product related to AI wearables does not fit existing locked types but is a distinct product category.
Mention of 'You Can With AI podcast' is a media product but podcast is not in locked taxonomy; could be useful to track.

notes: Many mentions of people on platform X (Twitter) with quoted tweets included.
Some entities like MCP and Mac Mini are ambiguous or hardware and flagged for review.
Focus was on meaningful references to companies, products, models, and key persons central to claims.
URLs were included only when explicitly mentioned or known (Blitzy).
Editorial sentiment mostly neutral to positive except for some outage and market reaction mentions.
